Citizens United was one of the worst Supreme Court decisions in our history.

It's why I've pushed 18-year term limits for a Court with too much unchecked power, why I support public campaign financing, & why I'm proud to co-sponsor ending Citizens United for good. https://t.co/cIxhCu8ZtY

Getting struck by lightning is more likely than voter fraud in the United States. 

The SAVE Act isn't a bill to stop that — it's a bill to disenfranchise millions of eligible Americans. It should NOT become law. https://t.co/3jyA4NPLm0

No credible threat. No plan. No accountability.

Just a president who rushed to war amidst his own scandals—all while raking in $4 billion for himself and leaving Americans to pay the price. https://t.co/JSFciHmkgp

Huge win today: my first bill to become law! 🎉

The bipartisan RESIDE Act turns vacant, blighted properties into homes families can actually afford.

Baltimore alone has 11,000 homes sitting empty. This law will help turn them into real opportunity. 🏡 https://t.co/KEOcJ9VCnn

That's not up for debate—it's in the Constitution.

And that's why today's ruling is a win for our nation.
